problem id: fa553b92
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (ROT(3) AND NOT SHR(6)) XOR NOT SHL(1)

examples:
  01010001 -> 11010111
  00001000 -> 10101111
  01010100 -> 11110101
  01000110 -> 01000001
  10101110 -> 11010110
  11110011 -> 10000101
  00101101 -> 11001100
  01101001 -> 01100111
  00000111 -> 11001001

query: 01010011
predicted answer: 11000011
